## How was it verified?

<!-- Which of the gates did you run? -->

- [ ] `pytest -m "not integration"` (proxion-messenger-core)
- [ ] `npm test` (web)
- [ ] a11y/keyboard smokes, if UI changed (`npm run smoke:a11y`, `smoke:keyboard`)
- [ ] i18n check, if strings changed (`npm run check:i18n`)
